channel.title: aws on MK's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in aws on MK's Blog

item.title: DAG Workflow Using AWS Step Functions and AWS Lambda
item.description: At Instamojo, we use Amazon Redshift as the data warehouse. A typical requirement for analytics team is to aggregate new data from multiple source tables (say raw events) that can later be used in BI tools, dashboards, charts or other machine learning jobs. For the sake of simplicity, let's assume these are the aggregate operations performed \( f = MIN(x) \) \( f = MAX(x) \) \( f = COUNT(x) \)
